data.name: internal_beatmaps
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all internal beatmaps? This deletes OMS-managed beatmap files from disk.

data.name: external_beatmaps
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all external beatmaps? This removes OMS references only and will not delete files from external libraries.

data.name: beatmap_videos
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all beatmaps videos? This cannot be undone!

data.name: offsets
data.value: Are you sure you want to reset all local beatmap offsets? This cannot be undone!

data.name: skins
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all skins? This cannot be undone!

data.name: collections
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all collections? This cannot be undone!

data.name: scores
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all scores? This cannot be undone!

data.name: mod_presets
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete all mod presets?

data.name: internal_beatmap_delete_action
data.value: Delete OMS-managed beatmap files from disk.

data.name: external_beatmap_delete_action
data.value: Remove the OMS reference only. Files in the external library will not be deleted.
